args.subject: Action required: Coordinate with development team — Start initial phase (Due 2024-05-20)
args.body:
Hi David,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): please coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project. Deadline: 2024-05-20.

What I need from you:
- Confirm that you have aligned the development team and scheduled the kickoff.
- Share the initial plan/timeline and any resource needs or blockers by the deadline.

Please reply to confirm when this is started or if you need help.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Send meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com (Due 2024-05-21)
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): please email the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

What I need from you:
- Attach the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" and send it to john.mitchell@gmail.com.
- Confirm once the email has been sent and share any feedback you receive.

If you can’t find the file, let me know and I’ll help locate it.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Review sales projections & provide feedback (Due 2024-05-19)
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): please review the sales projections and provide your feedback. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

What I need from you:
- Review the current sales projections and comment on assumptions, numbers, and risks.
- Provide written feedback or annotated changes by the deadline.

Please reply with your feedback or let me know if you need access to the projections document.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

Done — I emailed David, Linda, and Mark with clear instructions about their assigned tasks from the team meeting minutes. Each message asks them to confirm or report back and includes the relevant deadline. I can also:

- Send you copies of the sent messages.
- Add these assignments to your task tracker or calendar with reminders.
- Follow up with each person after a set number of days.
